column5: ∀ {𝒞 : Type u₁} [inst : Cat 𝒞] {𝒟 : Type u₂} [inst_1 : Cat 𝒟] {F : 𝒞 → 𝒟} {G : 𝒟 → 𝒞} [inst_2 : Functor F] [inst_3 : Functor G] (adj : F ⊣ G) {A B : 𝒟} (f : Cat.Hom A B), Cat.comp (Functor.map (Functor.map f)) (counit adj B) = Cat.comp (counit adj A) f
column6: Counit naturality: F(G f) ≫ ε_B = ε_A ≫ f.

column5: ∀ {𝒞 : Type u₁} [inst : Cat 𝒞] {𝒟 : Type u₂} [inst_1 : Cat 𝒟] {F : 𝒞 → 𝒟} {G : 𝒟 → 𝒞} [inst_2 : Functor F] [inst_3 : Functor G] (adj : F ⊣ G) (A : 𝒞), Cat.comp (Functor.map (unit adj A)) (counit adj (F A)) = Cat.id (F A)
column6: Triangle identity I: F(η_A) ≫ ε_{F A} = id_{F A}.

column5: ∀ {𝒞 : Type u₁} [inst : Cat 𝒞] {𝒟 : Type u₂} [inst_1 : Cat 𝒟] {F : 𝒞 → 𝒟} {G : 𝒟 → 𝒞} [inst_2 : Functor F] [inst_3 : Functor G] (adj : F ⊣ G) (B : 𝒟), Cat.comp (unit adj (G B)) (Functor.map (counit adj B)) = Cat.id (G B)
column6: Triangle identity II: η_{G B} ≫ G(ε_B) = id_{G B}.

column5: ∀ {𝒞 : Type u₁} [inst : Cat 𝒞] {𝒟 : Type u₂} [inst_1 : Cat 𝒟] {F : 𝒞 → 𝒟} {G : 𝒟 → 𝒞} [inst_2 : Functor F] [inst_3 : Functor G] (adj : F ⊣ G) {A : 𝒞} {B : 𝒟} (h : Cat.Hom (F A) B), adj.φ h = Cat.comp (unit adj A) (Functor.map h)
column6: φ(h) = η_A ≫ G(h) — reconstruct φ from the unit.

column5: ∀ {𝒞 : Type u₁} [inst : Cat 𝒞] {𝒟 : Type u₂} [inst_1 : Cat 𝒟] {F : 𝒞 → 𝒟} {G : 𝒟 → 𝒞} [inst_2 : Functor F] [inst_3 : Functor G] (adj : F ⊣ G) {A : 𝒞} {B : 𝒟} (g : Cat.Hom A (G B)), adj.ψ g = Cat.comp (Functor.map g) (counit adj B)
